title_en: SpaceX launches Starlink mission from Cape Canaveral as stock trades on the Nasdaq for first time
summary_en: The company debuted on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “SPCX” and began trading with a massive valuation of $1.77 trillion. Liftoff from pad 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station happened at 8:37 a.m. EDT (1237 UTC).

title_en: SpaceX launches 24 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 rocket from Vandenberg
